meaning: adj.青春期前的,接近青春期的,13岁以下的n.青春期前的孩子,不满13岁的儿童
examples: I'm a preteen doing homework at the kitchen table.
Born in Cairo, he had spent a few years in Oregon as a preteen while his father earned a PhD.
As years went by Mr. Schaefer increasingly focused Claire's on the teenage and preteen markets.
As a preteen, Ms. Krall spent hours listening to her father's vast collection of 78-rpm records.
